global_description: Insect with delicate, colorful wings, slender body, and antennae. Wings often display vibrant patterns and hues, ranging from blues and reds to yellows and greens. The body is thin and segmented, with six legs and a pair of antennae on the head.

part_details.wings: Large, colorful with intricate patterns, often symmetrical
part_details.body: Slender, segmented, typically dark or muted in color
part_details.antennae: Pair on head, thin and elongated
part_details.legs: Three pairs, attached to the thorax
